name: Marketing & Brand
description: Marketing is the primary growth engine for GO. Three-phase strategy: pre-launch lead generation via Meta ads and email nurture (underway), soft launch to email list July 1, and hard launch ~July 28 activated by Georgia Godwin as brand ambassador. All conversion happens inside Everfit. The website's job is credibility and lead capture only. Current list ~1,400 growing ~50/day. Meta CPL $0.97 — well below the $1.50 model assumption.

actions.task: Chase Georgia Godwin contract signature — launch planning cannot be finalised without this (see WS03)
Decide founding member pricing — blocked on overall pricing decision (WS01/WS02)
Pull ActiveCampaign engagement data — open rates, click rates, unsubscribes per email. Document baseline now.
Build 'I Want to Quit' Meta campaign — creative brief, ad copy, targeting. Emotionally resonant, likely broadest reach of all lead magnets.
Write emails 8–11 for nurture sequence: happy ending story → product reveal → founding member offer → launch
Build soft launch email sequence — 3 emails for July 1 soft launch (GO is open / reminder / last call). Draft by end of May, finalise June.
Prepare Georgia activation brief — what she posts, when, copy, links. Send to her management by early June.
Confirm Everfit enterprise supports founding member pricing — discount codes or tiered pricing
Scale Meta spend — $1,500/month now → $3,000 in May → $8,000 in June. Increment carefully and monitor CPL.
Set up weekly marketing dashboard — CPL, list size, daily signups, email open/click rates. Review every Monday.
Systematically repurpose email content to social — every email topic is a social post or reel idea already written
Begin mini-influencer identification — identify 20 target gymnastics parent creators by end of May. Use Emma Nedov and Georgia's networks.
Draft press kit — GO founding story, Georgia involvement, founder bio, key images from AIS shoot. Target: June.
Create pre-launch social calendar for June/July — 4 weeks of planned content (not rigid but documented). Min 4–5 posts/week on Instagram.

ideas.text: Email 3 (Kym's founding story) is the single strongest trust asset — reference it across website, ads, and social, not just the email sequence
'I Want to Quit' guide is a better introduction to GO's philosophy than any exercise guide — emotionally sophisticated, broader audience, positions GO as support not just conditioning
Long-term: map lead magnets to the full GO content library — each free guide teases content that lives in the app, creating a clear free-to-paid path
Georgia is a credibility anchor, not a spokesperson — the positioning is 'even Georgia Godwin thinks parents need this.' That's more powerful than any ad.
UK paid campaigns bombed (CPL $2.58 vs $0.96 US). Deprioritise UK paid until US and AU traction established.
